name: code-quality-atlas
description: Marketplace for the code-quality-atlas skill suite.

plugins.name: code-quality-atlas
plugins.description: 37 code-review and maintenance skills derived from a verified code-quality research atlas: 24 diff-shaped review lenses, 9 repo-shaped audits, a decision-time lens, an artifact-conventions lens (reviews authored artifacts like SKILL.md against their own standard), a router that picks the right lenses for a change, and a synthesizer that merges their findings into one ranked verdict, with provenance, examples, and cross-model evals.

plugins.name: code-quality-atlas-collapsed
plugins.description: Collapsed 4-entrypoint form for cloud / account-skill / context-budget installs — lenses bundled and loaded on demand. Install this OR the standalone plugin, not both.
